title: paesia radula
intro: Paesia radula, also known as the ladder fern or walking fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paesia radula include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Paesia radula is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal tea or infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
